# BP-145 positive variant: a renamed pgxpool connection has no visible cleanup.
lang: go
file: BP-145-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: renamed-connection
---
package sample

import (
	"context"

	pgxpool "github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func query(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool) error {
	acquired, err := pool.Acquire(ctx)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	_, err = acquired.Query(ctx, "SELECT 1")
	return err
}
